sources.title: Rising Up To Command An Army From Hell | Full Action Adventure Movie | The Mummy: Rebirth
sources.description:
Renowned treasure hunters Daniela and Noe are hired by a deranged billionaire to locate an ancient Egyptian city rumored to possess mystical powers. But their discovery of a sealed tomb inadvertently awakens a mummy whose sole aim is to plunge humanity back into the Dark Ages. In a frantic race against time, Daniela must stop the mummy from unleashing catastrophic destruction upon the modern world.
2019.  Stars: Shamel Hashish, Brittany Goodwin, Deanna Grace Congo, John Brown, David E. Cazares

metadata.Plot: An English librarian called Evelyn Carnahan becomes interested in starting an archaeological dig at the ancient city of Hamunaptra. She gains the help of Rick O'Connell, after saving him from his death. What Evelyn, her brother Jonathan and Rick are unaware of is that another group of explorers are interested in the same dig. Unfortunately for everyone, this group ends up unleashing a curse which been laid on the dead High Priest Imhotep. Now 'The Mummy' is awake and it's going to take a lot more than guns to send him back to where he came from.
metadata.Writer: Stephen Sommers, Lloyd Fonvielle, Kevin Jarre
metadata.Actors: Brendan Fraser, Rachel Weisz, John Hannah
metadata.Language: English, Egyptian (Ancient), Arabic, Chinese, Hebrew, Hungarian
metadata.Awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 5 wins & 24 nominations total
